subsection.heading: Federal Charter.—
subsection.content: Korean War Veterans Association, Incorporated (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit organization that meets the requirements for a veterans service organization under section 501(c)(19) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 and that is organized under the laws of the State of New York, is a federally chartered corporation.

subsection.heading: Expiration of Charter.—
subsection.content: If the corporation does not comply with the provisions of this chapter, the charter granted by subsection (a) shall expire.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 501(c)(19) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, referred to in subsec. (a), is classified to section 501(c)(19) of Title 26, Internal Revenue Code.
